          have h₆ : stoppedProcess X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) s ω = X s ω := by
            simp [h₅, stoppedProcess]
            <;>
            aesop
          rw [h₆]
          have h₇ : stoppingTime (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ≤ stoppingTime (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) := le_rfl
          have h₈ : ‖X s ω‖ ≤ K := by
            -- Prove that the norm of X s ω is bounded by K.
            have h₉ : stoppingTime (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω ≤ s := h₅
            have h₁₀ : ‖X s ω‖ < K := by
              simp_all [hittingAfter, stoppingTime, stoppingTime_val]
              <;>
              (try omega) <;>
              (try aesop) <;>
              (try linarith)
              <;>
              (try simp_all [Set.mem_Ici]) <;>
              (try norm_num) <;>
              (try linarith)
              <;>
              (try aesop)
            linarith
          linarith
        · -- Subcase: stoppingTime (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω > s
          have h₆ : stoppedProcess X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) s ω = 0 := by
            simp [h₅, stoppedProcess]
            <;>
            aesop
          rw [h₆]
          simp [norm_zero]
          <;>
          (try positivity) <;>
          (try linarith)
          <;>
          (try aesop)
      -- Use the fact that the supremum is bounded by K.
      calc
        ⨆ s ≤ t, ‖stoppedProcess X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) s ω‖ ≤ ⨆ s ≤ t, (K : ℝ≥0∞) := by
          apply iSup_mono_on (fun s _ => by
            have h₅ := h₄ s ‹_›
            exact normCast_mono h₅)
          <;> aesop
        _ = K := by
          simp [iSup_const]
          <;>
          (try simp_all [le_refl]) <;>
          (try linarith)
    linarith

by
  have h1 : ⨆ s ≤ t, ‖stoppedProcess X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) s ω‖ ≤ K + Set.indicator {ω | hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ t} (fun ω ↦ ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖) ω := by
    have h2 : ∀ (s : ι), s ≤ t → ‖stoppedProcess X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) s ω‖ ≤ K + Set.indicator {ω | hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ t} (fun ω ↦ ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖) ω := by
      intro s hs
      have h3 : ‖stoppedProcess X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) s ω‖ ≤ K + Set.indicator {ω | hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ t} (fun ω ↦ ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖) ω := by
        by_cases h : hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ t
        · -- Case: hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ t
          have h4 : Set.indicator {ω | hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ t} (fun ω ↦ ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖) ω = ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖ := by
            simp [h]
          rw [h4]
          have h5 : stoppingTime (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) (borel ι) ≤ (t : WithTop ι) := h
          have h6 : ‖stoppedProcess X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) s ω‖ ≤ K := by
            -- Use the property of the hitting time to bound the norm
            by_cases h7 : s ≤ hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω
            · -- Case: s ≤ hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω
              simp_all [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
              <;>
                (try norm_num) <;>
                (try linarith) <;>
                (try simp_all [le_refl]) <;>
                (try simp_all [le_of_lt]) <;>
                (try simp_all [WithTop.coe_le_coe]) <;>
                (try simp_all [hittingAfter, firstHittingTime, le_refl])
              <;>
                (try {
                  simp_all [Set.mem_Ici]
                  <;>
                  linarith
                })
            · -- Case: s > hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω
              simp_all [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
              <;>
                (try norm_num) <;>
                (try linarith) <;>
                (try simp_all [le_refl]) <;>
                (try simp_all [le_of_lt]) <;>
                (try simp_all [WithTop.coe_le_coe]) <;>
                (try simp_all [hittingAfter, firstHittingTime, le_refl])
              <;>
                (try {
                  simp_all [Set.mem_Ici]
                  <;>
                  linarith
                })
          have h8 : ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖ ≥ 0 := by positivity
          linarith
        · -- Case: ¬(hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ t)
          have h4 : Set.indicator {ω | hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ t} (fun ω ↦ ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖) ω = 0 := by
            simp [h]
          rw [h4]
          have h5 : ‖stoppedProcess X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) s ω‖ = 0 := by
            -- Since the stopping time is not ≤ t, the stopped process is zero
            have h6 : s ≤ t := hs
            have h7 : ¬(hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ t) := h
            have h8 : stoppingTime (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) (borel ι) > (t : WithTop ι) := by
              simp_all [le_def]
              <;>
                (try norm_num) <;>
                (try linarith) <;>
                (try simp_all [le_refl]) <;>
                (try simp_all [le_of_lt]) <;>
                (try simp_all [WithTop.coe_le_coe])
              <;>
                (try {
                  simp_all [Set.mem_Ici]
                  <;>
                  linarith
                })
            have h9 : s < hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω := by
              -- Prove that s < hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω
              have h10 : (s : WithTop ι) ≤ (t : WithTop ι) := by
                exact_mod_cast hs
              have h11 : (s : WithTop ι) < stoppingTime (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) (borel ι) := by
                exact lt_of_le_of_lt h10 h8
              exact mod_cast h11
            simp_all [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
            <;>
              (try norm_num) <;>
              (try linarith) <;>
              (try simp_all [le_refl]) <;>
              (try simp_all [le_of_lt]) <;>
              (try simp_all [WithTop.coe_le_coe]) <;>
              (try simp_all [hittingAfter, firstHittingTime, le_refl])
            <;>
              (try {
                simp_all [Set.mem_Ici]
                <;>
                linarith
              })
          rw [h5]
          norm_num
          <;>
            (try linarith) <;>
            (try simp_all [le_refl]) <;>
            (try simp_all [le_of_lt]) <;>
            (try simp_all [WithTop.coe_le_coe]) <;>
            (try simp_all [hittingAfter, firstHittingTime, le_refl])
          <;>
            (try {
              simp_all [Set.mem_Ici]
              <;>
              linarith
            })
      exact h3
    -- Use the fact that the supremum of the norms is bounded by K plus the indicator
    calc
      ⨆ s, ⨆ (_ : s ≤ t), ‖stoppedProcess X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) s ω‖ ≤ ⨆ s, ⨆ (_ : s ≤ t), (K + Set.indicator {ω | hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ t} (fun ω ↦ ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖) ω) := by
        apply iSup₂_mono
        intro s
        apply iSup_mono
        intro hs
        exact h2 s hs
      _ = K + Set.indicator {ω | hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ t} (fun ω ↦ ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖) ω := by
        have h3 : ∀ s : ι, ∀ (hs : s ≤ t), K + Set.indicator {ω | hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ t} (fun ω ↦ ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖) ω = K + Set.indicator {ω | hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ t} (fun ω ↦ ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖) ω := by
          intro s hs
          rfl
        simp_all [iSup_const]
        <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith) <;>
          (try simp_all [le_refl]) <;>
          (try simp_all [le_of_lt]) <;>
          (try simp_all [WithTop.coe_le_coe]) <;>
          (try simp_all [hittingAfter, firstHittingTime, le_refl])
        <;>
          (try {
            simp_all [Set.mem_Ici]
            <;>
            linarith
          })
  exact h1
